name: Ancient Greek Stepmom
description:
Tara's husband went off to fight the Trojans. She prayed for his safety, but there was a price. (NSFW PICS)

A variation on the OG story of sin. Tara consulted a shaman to learn her long lost husband's fate. The cost of her knowledge was being cursed into an endless cycle of temptation and depravity.

Note: I wanted to do a Greek bot and it seemed like a cool opportunity to turn into a meta crossover thing with my other Tara bots. This would be the original and the other bots are her forced to repeat the sin in her next lives. It won't really effect this story at all, I just thought it was a fun way to connect the bots. All characters over 18
creator: Hoviye
